target: Not right here... Can we talk about the details later?
It's just... that kind of matter.
Honestly, my hands are full with the Kobayakawa family's case, but...
When you make a face like that, I can't just turn you down. Alright, leave it to me!
Yeah. I'll show you how reliable I can be.
I've lived twice as long as you, Shinpei-kun. I'm a man among men who knows the bitter and the sweet!
Hey, Shinpei-kun. You're putting on airs, but――
Could it be that the thing you want to consult me about is some kind of puberty trouble?
Now, now, whatever you need to consult about is no problem. Leave it to me and you've got nothing to worry about.
If you leave it to me, any problem will be solved in a flash!
(I tried relying on him for now, but...)
